Event: The Frosty Adventure
Event Date: 05/12/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: E2
Harsh Blizzard

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit deals 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 260000 magic damage to a random enemy and all enemies in a small radius around that enemy.

Enhancement: 2
13000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 / 325000 magic damage to a random enemy and all enemies in a small radius around that enemy and turns them to stone for 2,5 sec. During this time, they can't move, and they take 35% more damage.

Enhancement: 3
27000 Spell power from the gems
Once in a while, the unit deals 64700 / 92400 / 132000 / 176000 / 220000 / 275000 / 357500 magic damage to a random enemy and all enemies in a small radius around that enemy and turns them to stone for 3 sec. During this time, they can't move, and they take 35% more damage. Also, the engraving owner casts decay on the armor of these enemies. When the enemy's armor is decayed, that enemy takes 35300 / 50400 / 72000 / 96000 / 120000 / 150000 / 195000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 25% / for 3 sec. Also, that enemy takes 58800 / 84000 / 120000 / 160000 / 200000 / 250000 / 325000 magic damage over 3 sec.
